• Responsive mining game with procedural world, mobile controls, and admin host management.
  • Customizable UI: gauges, settings, shop, inventory, teleporters, and chat.
  • Sound engine, cloud save, update checker, and dynamic lighting effects.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy('drill')

This page implements a full‑featured 2‑D mining experience. It handles map generation, player movement, block mining, building, and multiplayer synchronization while providing extensive UI controls and persistent settings.
